description_long: This is a whole head of Napa cabbage, also known as Chinese cabbage, with a dense, elongated form and tightly packed, overlapping leaves. The outer leaves are a muted greenish-yellow, transitioning to a paler, almost white color toward the central rib. The surface texture is crinkled and veined, with a prominent, thick central rib running the length of each leaf. The base is capped with a stubby, brownish stem where the leaves converge. The overall appearance is fresh, with the leaves showing a slight curl and undulating edges. The object is solid and compact, typical of a mature, market-ready head of lettuce.
description: A dense, elongated head of Napa cabbage with tightly packed, crinkled leaves and a thick central rib. The outer leaves are greenish-yellow, fading to pale white near the center.
description_view_0: The base of the lettuce is visible, showing the brownish stem where the leaves converge tightly.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the elongated shape, overlapping leaves, and the thick, pale central rib.
description_view_2: The back view displays the broad, pale surface of the leaves and the overall compactness of the head.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, emphasizing the crinkled leaf texture and the transition from greenish-yellow to pale white.
